payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet/closet door with a recessed central panel and narrow surrounding frame, wood-veneer grain visible, slightly worn finish with a lighter glossy reflection near the lower center; occupies most of the vertical crop and appears photographed from about 1.0 m away (tight crop).

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown wooden cabinet door","long_description":"Tall dark-brown wooden cabinet/closet door with a recessed central panel and narrow surrounding frame, wood-veneer grain visible, slightly worn finish with a lighter glossy reflection near the lower center; occupies most of the vertical crop and appears photographed from about 1.0 m away (tight crop).","attributes":["dark brown","wood veneer","recessed center panel","vertical rectangular","single door","worn finish","glossy reflection lower center","tight/edge crop"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
